# AGENTS.md

⚠️ **IMPORTANT**: Treat the file in `.Agents/AGENTS.md` as the main AGENTS.md file.

This file in the main directory is a pointer only. The real instructions for all AI agents (Codex, Gemini, Deepseek, etc.) are in:
`.Agents/AGENTS.md`

**Do NOT edit this file.** Edit the file in `.Agents/` instead.
